system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.sp_tinhluyke_reverse_fast","body":"CREATE   PROCEDURE dbo.sp_TinhLuyKe_Reverse_Fast
    @Nam INT,
    @Loai NVARCHAR(50) = N'LuyKeThang'
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    SET XACT_ABORT ON;

    DECLARE @ThangHienTai INT = MONTH(GETDATE());
    DECLARE @NamHienTai INT = YEAR(GETDATE());
    DECLARE @TargetThang INT = CASE WHEN @Nam = @NamHienTai THEN @ThangHienTai ELSE 12 END;

    PRINT CONCAT('=== BẮT ĐẦU TÍNH LŨY KẾ NGƯỢC NĂM ', @Nam, ' - LOẠI: ', @Loai, ' ===');

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 1) Ton kho thực tế (dùng làm tồn cuối của "tháng target" trong năm đó)
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#TonKho') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #TonKho;
    SELECT 
        mavt COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS AS mavt,
        SUM(CAST(soluong AS DECIMAL(38,6))) AS slton_thucte
    INTO #TonKho
    FROM tr_tonkho_sum
    GROUP BY mavt;

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 2) Nhập / Xuất trong năm (ép kiểu DECIMAL(38,6))
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Nhap') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Nhap;
    CREATE TABLE #Nhap (
        mavt NVARCHAR(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS,
        thang INT,
        slnhap DECIMAL(38,6),
        giatri_nhap DECIMAL(38,6)
    );

    INSERT INTO #Nhap
    SELECT 
        n.mavt COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS,
        MONTH(n.ngaynhap),
        SUM(CAST(n.slnhap AS DECIMAL(38,6))),
        SUM(CAST(n.slnhap AS DECIMAL(38,6)) * CAST(n.gianhap AS DECIMAL(38,6)) * CAST(n.tigia AS DECIMAL(38,6)))
    FROM tr_ctphieunhap n
    INNER JOIN tr_phieunhap pn ON pn.sopn = n.sopn
    INNER JOIN #TonKho tk ON tk.mavt = n.mavt COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
    WHERE pn.active = 1
      AND YEAR(n.ngaynhap) = @Nam
      AND ISNULL(n.gianhap, 0) > 0
    GROUP BY n.mavt, MONTH(n.ngaynhap);

    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Xuat') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Xuat;
    CREATE TABLE #Xuat (
        mavt NVARCHAR(50) COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS,
        thang INT,
        slxuat DECIMAL(38,6),
        giatri_xuat DECIMAL(38,6)
    );

    INSERT INTO #Xuat
    SELECT 
        x.mact COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS,
        MONTH(x.ngaytao),
        SUM(CAST(x.soluong AS DECIMAL(38,6))),
        SUM(CAST(x.soluong AS DECIMAL(38,6)) * CAST(x.giaxuat AS DECIMAL(38,6)))
    FROM tr_ctphieuxuat x
    INNER JOIN tr_phieuxuat px ON px.sopx = x.phieuxuat
    INNER JOIN #TonKho tk ON tk.mavt = x.mact COLLATE SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
    WHERE px.active = 1
      AND YEAR(x.ngaytao) = @Nam
      AND ISNULL(x.giaxuat, 0) > 0
    GROUP BY x.mact, MONTH(x.ngaytao);

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 3) Khung tháng 1..12 cho mỗi mavt, và tổng hợp NX
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    ;WITH ThangCTE AS (
        SELECT t.mavt,
               v.thang
        FROM #TonKho t
        CROSS APPLY (
            SELECT TOP 12 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS thang
            FROM master..spt_values
        ) v
    )
    , NX AS (
        SELECT 
            c.mavt,
            c.thang,
            ISNULL(n.slnhap, 0)      AS slnhap,
            ISNULL(n.giatri_nhap, 0) AS giatri_nhap,
            ISNULL(x.slxuat, 0)      AS slxuat,
            ISNULL(x.giatri_xuat, 0) AS giatri_xuat
        FROM ThangCTE c
        LEFT JOIN #Nhap n ON n.mavt = c.mavt AND n.thang = c.thang
        LEFT JOIN #Xuat x ON x.mavt = c.mavt AND x.thang = c.thang
    )
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 4) Tính các tổng lũy kế (cộng dồn theo thứ tự thang ASC)
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    , L1 AS (
        SELECT
            nx.*,
            CAST((nx.slnhap - nx.slxuat) AS DECIMAL(38,6)) AS net_m,
            SUM(CAST((nx.slnhap - nx.slxuat) AS DECIMAL(38,6)))
                OVER (PARTITION BY nx.mavt ORDER BY nx.thang ASC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS cum_net,
            SUM(CAST((nx.slnhap + nx.slxuat) AS DECIMAL(38,6)))
                OVER (PARTITION BY nx.mavt ORDER BY nx.thang ASC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS cum_qty,
            SUM(CAST((nx.giatri_nhap + nx.giatri_xuat) AS DECIMAL(38,6)))
                OVER (PARTITION BY nx.mavt ORDER BY nx.thang ASC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS cum_val
        FROM NX nx
    )
    , L2 AS (
        SELECT
            l.*,
            -- cum_net_at_target: giá trị cum_net tại tháng @TargetThang (cùng năm @Nam)
            MAX(CASE WHEN l.thang = @TargetThang THEN l.cum_net END) 
                OVER (PARTITION BY l.mavt) AS cum_net_at_target
        FROM L1 l
        WHERE (@Nam < @NamHienTai) OR (@Nam = @NamHienTai AND l.thang <= @ThangHienTai)
              OR (@Nam < @NamHienTai)  -- keep full year for past years (target=12)
    )

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 5) Tạo bảng kết quả: tính sltoncuoi theo công thức set-based:
    -- sltoncuoi(m) = slton_current - (cum_net_at_target - cum_net(m))
    -- (với slton_current lấy từ #TonKho, slton_current = slton_thucte khi target month)
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    SELECT
        NEWID() AS Id,
        @Loai AS loai,
        l2.mavt,
        DATEFROMPARTS(@Nam, l2.thang, 1) AS ngay,
        CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(38,6)) AS sltondau, -- tính sau
        l2.slnhap,
        l2.slxuat,
        -- sltoncuoi theo công thức set-based
        (ISNULL(t.slton_thucte, 0) - (ISNULL(l2.cum_net_at_target, 0) - ISNULL(l2.cum_net, 0))) AS sltoncuoi,
        -- đơn giá trung bình tận dụng cum_val / cum_qty (tính từng tháng)
        CASE WHEN l2.cum_qty > 0 THEN l2.cum_val / l2.cum_qty ELSE 0 END AS dgton
    INTO #KetQua
    FROM L2 l2
    LEFT JOIN #TonKho t ON t.mavt = l2.mavt
    ;

    --------------
-- ... (truncated)","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.alltk","dbo.l1","dbo.l2","dbo.master","dbo.nx","dbo.ranked","dbo.thangcte","dbo.tr_ctphieunhap","dbo.tr_ctphieuxuat","dbo.tr_material_luyke","dbo.tr_phieunhap","dbo.tr_phieuxuat","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"writesTables":["dbo.k","dbo.m","dbo.tr_material_luyke"],"flags":["has-cte","has-group-by","has-window","has-temp-table","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
